title: taraxacum lingulatum
intro: Taraxacum lingulatum, also known as the toothwort dandelion or lesser dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum lingulatum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and improve digestion. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
